meaning: n.布加勒斯特(罗马尼亚的首都)
examples: Where Bucharest now stands, there once was a large, dense forest.
He worked as a dance instructor in London before setting himself up in Bucharest.
Miners gathered in the centre of Bucharest in a show of support for the government.
"I'm optimistic, " said Costin Iorgulescu, as we sat in a cafe in the capital Bucharest.
The Yorkshire club have only won one match all season, in Bucharest in the Challenge up.
